css_fixes.issue: The original page body uses position:absolute with overflow:hidden (likely for modal overlay management), while the migrated version uses static positioning with visible overflow. This causes fundamentally different page layout behavior.
css_fixes.styleChange: position: absolute -> static; overflow: hidden -> visible

css_fixes.issue: The original page constrains content sections to a max-width of ~1164px centered with auto margins (378px on each side) and inner padding of 15px/12px. The migrated version has no width constraint, causing content to stretch full-width across 1920px with no centering or padding.

The original uses flexbox display with horizontal scroll for product carousels (showing multiple products in a row). The migrated version uses block display with no scroll, causing product items to stack vertically instead of displaying in a horizontal carousel layout.
css_fixes.styleChange: display: flex -> block; overflow-x: scroll -> visible

css_fixes.issue: The footer section font size is reduced from 16px to 12px (a 4px/25% reduction) with corresponding line-height reduction from 24px to 18px. Background changes from white to a light gray (rgb(248,249,249)). Footer text will appear noticeably smaller and the background slightly different.

The original footer section has a distinct blue-gray background (rgb(220,225,227)) with 25px vertical padding, giving it a visually separated appearance. The migrated version uses a lighter gray background (rgb(248,249,249)) with no padding, making it blend more with surrounding content.
The original uses CSS table display for a structured multi-column product layout at 1164px width. The migrated version uses block display at full viewport width, losing the columnar table structure.

The original constrains images with max-width:100% and uses overflow:clip to prevent images from exceeding container bounds. The migrated version removes the max-width constraint and sets overflow to visible, which could cause images to overflow their containers.
css_fixes.styleChange: max-width: 100% -> none; overflow: clip -> visible; font-size: 14px -> 16px

css_fixes.issue: The original displays products in a horizontally scrollable flex container at 1072px width. The migrated version changes to block layout at full width with no scroll, fundamentally changing the product browsing interaction pattern.
css_fixes.styleChange: display: flex -> block; overflow-x: scroll -> visible; width: 1072px -> 1920px

css_fixes.issue: The original uses a Bootstrap-style grid system with negative margins (-12px) to create gutters between columns at 1164px container width. The migrated version removes this grid system, losing the columnar gutter spacing.
Inner content padding of 12px on each side is removed in the migrated version, causing content to touch the edges of its container without any breathing room.
